__instructions: Copy this file, rename it to lastname-year-keyword.json, and fill in the fields. Delete all __note keys before saving.
__id_note: Must exactly match the filename without .json. Use lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only.
__type_note: One of: journal | conference | book | book-chapter | thesis | preprint

title.en: Full title of the publication in English

__title_note: If you only have one language, leave the other as an empty string.
__authors_note: List all authors in order. Format: 'Lastname, Firstname'. Your own name should be first.
__year_note: Four-digit publication year as a number, not a string.
__journal_note: For type=journal only. Leave empty string for other types.
__conference_note: For type=conference only. Full conference name.
__publisher_note: For type=book or book-chapter. Publisher name.
__book_title_note: For type=book-chapter only. Title of the edited volume this chapter appears in.
__editors_note: For type=book-chapter or type=book. Array of editor names, format 'Lastname, Firstname'.
__volume_note: Journal volume number as a string. Leave empty if not applicable.
__issue_note: Journal issue number as a string. Leave empty if not applicable.
__pages_note: Page range as a string, e.g. '201-225'. Leave empty if not yet assigned.
__doi_note: DOI only — do NOT include https://doi.org/. Example: 10.1037/abc0000123
__url_note: Full URL to the paper online. Use this if there is no DOI.
__pdf_note: Path to a PDF stored in /public/downloads/. Example: /downloads/lastname-2024.pdf

abstract.en: Write the abstract in English here.

__abstract_note: Optional but recommended. Bilingual object. Leave as empty string if not available.
__tags_note: Array of lowercase keywords used for filtering on the publications page.
__featured_note: Set to true to highlight this paper on the homepage or a featured section.
